summarySection.summary: Data Engineer with proven expertise in building scalable data pipelines and backend services. Proficient in Python, SQL, and PostgreSQL, with hands-on experience in developing ETL processes and optimizing data workflows. Committed to transforming complex data into actionable insights through innovative engineering practices.

experience.description:
• Developed and optimized data processing pipelines using Python and PostgreSQL, achieving a ~40% reduction in latency for backend services.
• Built REST APIs in Python/Django to support secure data workflows for financial compliance, enhancing operational efficiency.
• Collaborated with cross-functional teams to design scalable data models and service architectures, ensuring robust data integration and processing capabilities.
• Created interactive dashboards with React, providing real-time visibility into data metrics and improving decision-making for stakeholders.

projects.description:
• Engineered a full-stack finance application that automates account aggregation and transaction tracking, delivering insights through a unified dashboard.
• Designed and implemented FastAPI services and PostgreSQL schemas for seamless Plaid integrations, ensuring reliable transaction processing.
• Developed responsive React interfaces for user account management and financial analytics, enhancing user engagement and experience.
• Implemented secure data handling protocols (OAuth/JWT) to protect sensitive financial information and maintain compliance.

• Optimized Python data-processing pipelines and PostgreSQL queries, achieving a ~40% reduction in latency.
